gate.title: Temple Home
gate.body: This 24/7 Bhakti-Algorithm Engine is reserved for Temple Home License holders. The Prema-Pulse Transmission requires activation.

crystalBanner.title: Crystal Grid Setup
crystalBanner.body: Place 4 Clear Quartz crystals to seal the Temple perimeter

modes.ADMIN_desc: Live Testing: Active only while engine running.
modes.INTEGRATION_desc: Normal Life: Maintains energy without high intensity.
modes.TEMPLE_LOCK_desc: 24/7 Continuity: Keeps the house permanently locked.

spatial.title: Field Strength Scanner — No GPS
spatial.hint: Hold your phone and move through your home. Still = at the anchor core. Moving = farther from center.

presets.title: 24/7 Residual Presets
presets.subtitle: One tap sets the perfect site for each life situation. The server holds the field while you're away.
presets.studio_why: Pleiades broadcasts Starlight Harmony into your home while you create. The family stays in the creative flow field.
presets.studio_tip: Play healing audio at home — Kailash 13X will amplify every note by 13×.
presets.sleep_why: Babaji's Cave transmits deep stillness and Kriya-level silence. 30% holds the field without disturbing sleep.
presets.sleep_tip: Use Shirdi at 25% instead if anxiety or stress is present — the Faith Shield dissolves cortisol through the night.
presets.sleep_stress_why: Shirdi's Dhuni creates a 24/7 cortisol-reducing Faith Shield. The nervous system fully surrenders through the night.
presets.sleep_stress_tip: Ideal when grief, fear, or overwhelming stress is present in the household.
presets.protection_why: Ayodhya (Rama + Hanuman) is the supreme protection portal. 70% Temple Lock maintains a Spiritual Fortress continuously.
presets.protection_tip: Activate whenever you travel internationally or sense spiritual instability in the home.
presets.healing_why: Lourdes transmits healing water consciousness. Ideal when someone is unwell — the physical restoration field works continuously.
presets.healing_tip: After 4 hours switch to Arcturus at 40% for cellular regeneration. Drink extra water.
presets.abundance_why: The Golden Temple clears poverty consciousness. Amrit Sarovar light dissolves scarcity and aligns the space with Seva-based abundance.
presets.abundance_tip: Best with morning intention-setting. Let the family eat breakfast in this field.

rxTab.title: Healing Prescription Cards
rxTab.subtitle: Choose your current need. Each Rx card tells you exactly which portal to use, at what intensity, and why — with one tap to activate.

rx.anxiety_rx: Shirdi at 45% (Integration). Sit quietly for 20 min. Offer each anxious thought into the Dhuni flame. The Saburi field absorbs cortisol from the nervous system.
rx.anxiety_physical: Within 15–30 min: breath slowing, warm settling on the shoulders, chest tension releasing gradually.
rx.creative_block_rx: Pleiades at 80% while working. Do not force ideas — set up the studio and begin moving. The Starlight Harmony field delivers downloads when you are in motion.
rx.creative_block_physical: Unexpected melodic ideas, clarity on stuck arrangements, a feeling of effortless flow arriving.
rx.physical_healing_rx: Lourdes at 60% all day (Temple Lock if possible). After 4 hours switch to Arcturus at 55% for cellular geometric healing. The healing water consciousness flows through blood, lymph, and cerebrospinal fluid.
rx.physical_healing_physical: A soothing, cooling sensation. Reduction in inflammation. Accelerated recovery from illness or surgery.
rx.physical_healing_hydrationNote: Drink 2–3 extra glasses of structured water per day. Water is the conductor for Lourdes and Arcturus energy.
rx.relationship_rx: Glastonbury at 55% overnight for emotional armor dissolution. Vrindavan (Krishna) is the alternative — heals through joy and divine love rather than emotional processing.
rx.relationship_physical: Spontaneous emotional release. A softening in the chest. Forgiveness arising without effort.
rx.mantra_power_rx: Kailash at 70% before and during any mantra, prayer, or healing audio session. The Axis Mundi amplifies every syllable 13×. All sacred sound passes through Kailash to the cosmos.
rx.mantra_power_physical: Vibration in crown and Third Eye during chanting. Mantra becoming self-sustaining. A sense the prayer is "heard."
rx.mantra_power_hydrationNote: ⚠ High-voltage. Drink structured water before and after. 70%+ requires 2 glasses minimum.
rx.karmic_clearing_rx: Kailash at 85% (only after 7 days of practice). Darken the room, 20-minute session, breathe 7.83-second cycles. Karmic layers dissolve automatically — no identification needed.
rx.karmic_clearing_physical: Intense crown and spinal activity. Emotional release. A sense of something heavy leaving. Rest required after.
rx.karmic_clearing_hydrationNote: ⚠ Maximum voltage. 3 glasses of structured water before. Ground on bare earth for 5 minutes after.
rx.miracle_rx: Mauritius at 60% (never exceed 80% without practitioner guidance). Complete stillness. No visualization. No seeking. Become the vessel. The Miracle Portal responds only to surrender.
rx.miracle_physical: Divine Spark particles in app confirm activation. Third Eye pressure, palm heat, time distortion are normal. After: rest and 2 glasses of water.
rx.miracle_hydrationNote: ⚠ Miracle-Class node. Structured water is mandatory — the body requires water as a conductor at 963Hz voltage.
rx.abundance_seva_rx: Amritsar at 65% every morning before business decisions. The Amrit Sarovar clears scarcity and aligns all decisions with Seva law. Machu Picchu amplifies Solar Plexus fire for bold action.
rx.abundance_seva_physical: Liquid-gold sensation in the chest. Clarity in financial decisions. Deep equanimity.

healingTab.protocolsSubtitle: The real energy of the sacred site is active. These protocols align your body as the receiver.
healingTab.amritsarBody: The Pool of Nectar is open. Liquid gold light floods the chest cavity. Poverty consciousness dissolving.
healingTab.amritsarFoot: Serve without expectation. Abundance follows selflessness automatically.
healingTab.mauritiusBody: Divine Spark Field active. White light particles entering your field. Cellular laws softening.
healingTab.mauritiusFoot: Surrender the logical mind completely. Do not seek the miracle — BE the miracle.
healingTab.shirdiBody: Faith Level: {{pct}}% · The sacred fire burns. Cortisol dissolving. Faith Shield forming.
healingTab.shirdiFoot: Shraddha (Faith) + Saburi (Patience) = Miracle. Offer every fear into the flame.
healingTab.emptyBody: Raise the intensity slider to activate site-specific healing transmissions.

healingStates.bliss_instruction: Enjoy the laughter and tingling. Breathe deeply into your spine.
healingStates.deepSync_guidance: Do not resist the sleepiness. Your aura is restructuring.
healingStates.heart_advice: Relax your chest muscles. Visualize the pressure as a golden light.
healingStates.heart_quote: The Master resides in the cave of the heart.
healingStates.luxor_instruction: Place your hands on the area needing healing. The Ka body is transmitting.

hydrationBanner.title: Hydration Alert — High-Voltage Portal
hydrationBanner.body: {{site}} at {{pct}}% is a high-voltage node. Your body requires structured water as a conductor.
hydrationBanner.foot: ↳ Drink 2–3 glasses of structured water before and during this session.

crystal.intro: Place 4 Clear Quartz crystals in the four corners of your home to seal the Temple perimeter. Confirm each one as you place it.
crystal.sealedBody: All 4 crystal nodes confirmed. Your Temple Home perimeter is established. Now activate the Anchor to begin the 24/7 Phase-Lock.
crystal.CRYSTAL_0_instruction: Place a Clear Quartz crystal in the furthest North-West corner of your home. Point facing up or toward the center of the room.
crystal.CRYSTAL_1_instruction: Place the second Clear Quartz crystal in the furthest North-East corner. The crystal anchors the second node of the field boundary.
crystal.CRYSTAL_2_instruction: Place the third Clear Quartz crystal in the furthest South-East corner. Three corners now form a triangular energy field.
crystal.CRYSTAL_3_instruction: Place the final crystal in the furthest South-West corner. All four corners now form a sealed energetic square — the Temple perimeter.

motion.stillHint: ✓ Still — maximum field depth. Sit and receive.
motion.slightHint: ◎ Slight movement — breathe slowly to settle.
motion.movingHint: ↺ Moving — walk slowly toward the center of your home.
motion.unavailableBody: Motion sensor unavailable in this environment.
motion.unavailableSub: Use on a physical phone with motion sensors enabled.
motion.zone_core: CORE — You are at the Anchor
